executives.name: Brian West
executives.background: Mr. West has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since August 2021. Prior to joining Boeing, he was CFO of Refinitiv and Oscar Health.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer, then Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: David Calhoun
executives.background: Former President and CEO of The Boeing Company; former Executive Chairman of Nielsen Holdings plc.

executives.name: David Wong
executives.background: Chief Product Officer since 2021. Previously held product leadership roles at Facebook and Microsoft.

executives.name: Steve Hasker
executives.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Thomson Reuters since March 2020. Previously served as CEO of CAA Global and held senior roles at Nielsen Holdings PLC and McKinsey & Company.

board_of_directors.name: David Calhoun
board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of The Boeing Company; former Executive Chairman of Nielsen Holdings plc.
